task: Give OpenClaw verified read/write and operational access to the complete Harness repository plus Gmail, Calendar, and recurring assistant tools

governance_bootstrap.summary: Applied CEO authority, completion evidence, production verification, and approval boundaries.
Applied origin-main deployment, Mac mini-only OpenClaw runtime, secret hygiene, and real-entrypoint verification.

requirements.requirement: OpenClaw can inspect all Harness repository content in real time
requirements.evidence: Native harness_workspace_read and harness_workspace_search tools use the live Mac mini repository and enforce the real repository root.

requirements.requirement: OpenClaw can create and update Harness files
requirements.evidence: Native harness_workspace_write uses root validation, symlink escape checks, atomic rename, size bounds, and optional SHA-256 optimistic locking.

requirements.requirement: OpenClaw can run verification and inspect Git state without arbitrary machine-wide execution
requirements.evidence: harness_workspace_exec permits trusted-path read-only Git commands and repository-scoped Node/pytest tests; arbitrary Python, shell, destructive Git, and executable-basename substitution are blocked.

requirements.requirement: OpenClaw can inspect Gmail and manage Calendar
requirements.evidence: Native Gmail search/get and Calendar list/create tools call the verified bridge; mutations must return real service output.

requirements.requirement: OpenClaw can create and remove recurring assistant jobs
requirements.evidence: Native cron list/create/remove tools call the production OpenClaw CLI and return real job JSON/IDs.

requirements.requirement: OpenClaw cannot claim completion without evidence
requirements.evidence: Skill contract requires path/hash, Calendar event ID, or cron job ID and explicit confirmation for deletion, external messages, deployment, push, finance, or destructive actions.

verification.name: bridge regression
verification.result: 34 passed after adding a Calendar-create parser regression

verification.name: independent review
verification.result: Claude architecture clear; Copilot full-diff clear after two blocking command-boundary findings were fixed

verification.name: production baseline user path
verification.command: OpenClaw agent no-mutation readiness prompt plus live Calendar list and Gmail search on the Mac mini
verification.result: Calendar and Gmail bridge calls returned real data, while the OpenClaw agent tool trace proved the missing native workspace/Gmail/Calendar/cron tools; this is the production gap addressed by the pending deployment

verification.name: production native tool proof
verification.command: OpenClaw agent invoked native repository read/search/write/verification, Gmail search/get, Calendar list, and cron create/remove/list tools
verification.result: Repository read/search/write returned real paths and SHA-256; read-only Git status ran; Gmail body and Calendar event were retrieved; cron ID e98a2909-f3c3-4823-9dd8-ae8d6a590add was created, removed, and final list returned zero jobs. The temporary repository probe was deleted.

verification.name: Calendar mutation proof and cleanup
verification.command: OpenClaw native Calendar create followed by exact-ID cleanup
verification.result: The first production mutation created event jr5v61f4p8c8rgvhppo3vscbn0 but exposed a missing argparse output field during result rendering. The temporary event was then deleted successfully and the parser defect was fixed with a regression test; redeployment and a clean create-result proof remain pending.

deploy.method: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh with only the plugin, skill, tests, review artifacts, and completion evidence paths
deploy.result: Initial native tools were deployed and exercised. A Calendar result-rendering defect found by the live mutation proof is fixed locally; status remains residual_risk until that fix is pushed, redeployed, and reverified.
